branding.headline: Tungsten Power PDF for Australian Enterprise and Government
branding.subheadline: The cost-effective Adobe Acrobat alternative trusted by enterprise, government, and legal organisations across Australia. Perpetual or subscription licensing, local support, and volume pricing tailored to your procurement requirements.

benefits.title: Significant cost savings over Adobe Acrobat
benefits.body: Tungsten Power PDF delivers enterprise-grade PDF capability at a fraction of Adobe Acrobat's cost. Volume licensing and perpetual options make budgeting simple for government and enterprise procurement.

benefits.title: Create, edit and convert with precision
benefits.body: Edit PDF text, images and pages directly. Convert to and from Word, Excel, PowerPoint, HTML and more — with formatting preserved accurately every time.

benefits.title: Redaction and compliance built in
benefits.body: Permanently redact sensitive information, apply Bates stamping, set document permissions and encrypt files. Meets compliance requirements for legal, government and healthcare environments.

benefits.title: Integrates with your existing systems
benefits.body: Native integration with Microsoft 365, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams and Box. Works within your existing document management environment without disruption.

proofPoints: Formerly Kofax — 25+ years enterprise document software
Deployed in 70+ countries including Australian government
Perpetual licensing — own it forever, no forced subscriptions
Local Australian support from VRA — 25 years experience

steps.title: Submit your enquiry
steps.text: Tell us about your organisation size, environment, and document workflow requirements.

steps.title: Receive a tailored proposal
steps.text: We outline the right Power PDF edition — Standard, Advanced or Business — with volume pricing and procurement-friendly licensing options.

steps.title: Trial and deploy
steps.text: Download a free 15-day trial, validate in your environment, and roll out with local onboarding support from our Australian team.

features.title: Professional redaction and security
features.body: Permanently redact sensitive data, apply document restrictions, encrypt with passwords, and manage security centrally across your organisation.

features.title: Cloud editing and Microsoft 365 integration
features.body: Power PDF 2025.3 introduces browser-based cloud editing and deep Microsoft Teams and OneDrive integration — work on PDFs anywhere, on any device.

faqs.q: How does Tungsten Power PDF compare to Adobe Acrobat?
faqs.a: Power PDF delivers comparable functionality to Adobe Acrobat — editing, conversion, redaction, e-signatures, and collaboration — at significantly lower cost. Volume licensing makes it particularly attractive for enterprise and government procurement.

Power PDF comes in Standard (individual users), Advanced (business users with redaction, collaboration and integrations), and Business (volume licensing with centralised management and cloud access). Perpetual and subscription options are available.

faqs.q: Is it suitable for Australian government procurement?
faqs.a: Yes — Tungsten Power PDF is widely deployed in government environments and supports standard Australian procurement pathways including panel arrangements and volume licensing. Local support is provided by our Australian team.

faqs.q: Does it integrate with SharePoint and Microsoft 365?
faqs.a: Yes — Power PDF integrates natively with SharePoint, Microsoft 365, OneDrive, Teams and Box. It also works within your existing document management systems.

faqs.q: Is there a free trial available?
faqs.a: Yes — Power PDF is available as a free 15-day trial with full functionality. Contact us and we will arrange access along with onboarding support from our Australian team.

faqs.q: Do you provide local Australian support?
faqs.a: Yes — all enquiries, licensing, onboarding and ongoing support are handled by Voice Recognition Australia, with 25 years experience deploying enterprise document software across Australia.
